Authored timer_regs.sv for packet module__timer_regs__function_model_01. The module owns LOAD, CTRL.ENABLE, APB legal address response, read mux behavior, and irq_q reset/deassert behavior for APB register transactions from the locked SSOT excerpt. The implementation keeps STATUS writes ignored and reserves CTRL upper bits by only sampling pwdata[0]. Tool evidence and PASS are intentionally not claimed in packet mode.
